mapper.update: UPDATE sell SET source = #{source}, frame = #{frame}, customer = #{customer}, time = #{time}, number = #{number}, total = #{total}, actual = #{actual}, money = #{money}, cost = #{cost}, account = #{account}, people = #{people}, logistics = #{logistics}, file = #{file}, data = #{data}, more = #{more}, examine = #{examine}, nucleus = #{nucleus}, cse = #{cse}, invoice = #{invoice}, `check` = #{check}, user = #{user} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, source, frame, customer, time, number, total, actual, money, cost, account, people, logistics, file, data, more, examine, nucleus, cse, invoice, `check`, user FROM sell WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, source, frame, customer, time, number, total, actual, money, cost, account, people, logistics, file, data, more, examine, nucleus, cse, invoice, `check`, user FROM sell WHERE id IN
#{id}
